---
title: "Xinru Wang"
description: "Contributor to the NYC Open Data Lab"
---

## Projects & Publications

-   [Beating Around the Bush: Uncovering the Hidden Link Between Urban Trees and Wildlife Activity](https://martinezc1-nyc-open-data-student-gallery.share.connect.posit.cloud/chapters/08-Beating-Around-the-Bush--Uncovering-the-Hidden-Link-Between-Urban-Trees-and-Wildlife-Activity-Xinru.html)

---

## Portfolio

A curated collection of work developed using reproducible workflows in R and Quarto.

-   📘 [View Portfolio Book](https://019c7c8e-197b-0c55-fbf6-d685497e25bb.share.connect.posit.cloud/)

---

## Contributions to the Lab

-   Contributor to the NYC Open Data Student Gallery\
-   Contributor to the development of the nycOpenData R package

---

## Links

-   [GitHub](https://github.com/xrwangxr)\
-   [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/xinru-wang-798937393/)\
-   [ORCID](https://orcid.org/0009-0006-3833-8199)
